# homebrew-gor-mobile — instructions for Claude

Homebrew tap for [gor-mobile](https://github.com/gorban-dev/gor-mobile).

## IMPORTANT: this repo is regenerated automatically

`Formula/gor-mobile.rb` is **regenerated by CI** in `gor-mobile` on `v*` tag push
(workflow `.github/workflows/release.yml`, job `publish-formula`).

**Do not edit `Formula/gor-mobile.rb` by hand** — CI will overwrite it on the next release.

## What can be edited

- `README.md` — tap description for users.
- `LICENSE`.
- `.gitignore`.

## If you really must hand-edit the formula

(e.g. a hot-fix between releases):
1. Edit `Formula/gor-mobile.rb`.
2. Commit with an explicit message (`manual: hot-fix url for vX.Y.Z`).
3. **Make the same change in `scripts/build-formula.sh` in the gor-mobile repo**, otherwise the next CI render will revert it.

## Install (for reference)

```sh
brew install gorban-dev/gor-mobile/gor-mobile
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Formula not edited by hand (except hot-fix)
- [ ] README reflects the current CLI state
